name_en: Tote Latest Autumn/Winter Series, I was recommended this bag, here comes a tote that can be worn, retaining the simple bag shape while having the large capacity of a big bag, can be carried by hand or crossbody, completely meeting daily travel needs, classic Oblique embroidery, iconic lettering, fashionable and versatile with full retro vibes
